nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, Who gives the sun for light by day And the fixed order of the moon and the stars for light by night, Who stirs up the sea so that its waves roar; The Lord of hosts is His name:

esv.text: Thus says the Lord, who gives the sun for light by day and the fixed order of the moon and the stars for light by night, who stirs up the sea so that its waves roar— the Lord of hosts is his name:

cnv.text: 那使太陽白晝發光， 派定月亮和星辰照耀黑夜， 又攪動海洋，使海浪澎湃的， 萬軍之耶和華是他的名， 他這樣說：

ccb.text: 使阳光白天照耀、 星月晚上发光、 大海波涛汹涌的万军之耶和华说：
